about.headline: Who I am
about.descriptionOne: Hey, I'm Pascal! I am currently pursuing further training as a Fullstack Developer, specializing in modern web technologies. My main focus is on frontend development using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and frameworks like Angular, while continuously expanding my backend skills. My goal is to build user-friendly, high-performance, and innovative web applications.
about.descriptionTwo: I am based in Norderstedt, Germany, and flexible regarding remote work, hybrid roles.
about.descriptionThree: I am open-minded and enthusiastic about learning new technologies and continuously improving my skills as an aspiring Fullstack Developer.
about.descriptionFour: My problem-solving approach is based on analytical thinking, creativity, persistence, and collaboration, aiming for efficient and elegant solutions.

skills.headline: Skills Set
skills.description: I possess strong skills in modern frontend technologies such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Angular, along with experience in Material Design. Additionally, I work with Git, Firebase, and REST APIs and am familiar with agile methodologies like Scrum. As an aspiring Fullstack Developer, I am driven by a strong growth mindset and continuously motivated to learn new technologies and adapt to the ever-evolving world of web development.
skills.descriptionFour: Feel free to contact me. I look forward to expanding on my previous knowledge.

future.headline: Future Projects
future.description: Here you can find a selection of my work

friends.headline: What my colleagues say about me
friends.friendOneAnswer: Pascal has proven to be a reliable team partner. His technical skills and proactive approach were crucial to the success of our project.

contact.headline: Contact me
contact.headlineTwo: Do you have a problem to solve?
contact.headlineTwoDescription: Encourage people to contact you and describe what role you are interested in. Show that you’ll add value to their projects through your work.
contact.description: Do you need a frontend developer?

legalnotice.headline: Legal Notice
legalnotice.acceptanceText: By accessing and using Portfolio (Product), you acknowledge and agree to the following terms and conditions, and any policies, guidelines, or amendments thereto that may be presented to you from time to time. We, the listed students, may update or change the terms and conditions from time to time without notice.
legalnotice.scopeTitle: Scope and Ownership of the Product
legalnotice.scopeText: Portfolio has been developed as part of a student group project in a web development bootcamp at the Developer Akademie GmbH. It has an educational purpose and is not intended for extensive personal or business usage. As such, we cannot guarantee consistent availability, reliability, accuracy, or any other aspect of quality regarding this Product.
legalnotice.scopeOwnership: The design of Portfolio is owned by the Developer Akademie GmbH. Unauthorized use, reproduction, modification, distribution, or replication of the design is strictly prohibited.
legalnotice.proprietaryText: Aside from the design owned by Developer Akademie GmbH, we, the listed students, retain all proprietary rights in Portfolio, including any associated copyrighted material, trademarks, and other proprietary information.
legalnotice.useText: Portfolio is intended to be used for lawful purposes only, in accordance with all applicable laws and regulations. Any use of Portfolio for illegal activities, or to harass, harm, threaten, or intimidate another person, is strictly prohibited. You are solely responsible for your interactions with other users of Portfolio.
legalnotice.disclaimerTitle: Disclaimer of Warranties and Limitation of Liability
legalnotice.disclaimerText: Portfolio is provided 'as is' without warranty of any kind, whether express or implied, including but not limited to the implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement. In no event will we, the listed students, or the Developer Akademie GmbH be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or exemplary damages, including but not limited to damages for loss of profits, goodwill, use, data, or other intangible losses, even if we have been advised of the possibility of such damages, arising out of or in connection with the use or performance of Portfolio.
legalnotice.indemnityText: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless us, the listed students, the Developer Akademie GmbH, and our affiliates, partners, officers, directors, agents, and employees, from and against any claim, demand, loss, damage, cost, or liability (including reasonable legal fees) arising out of or relating to your use of Portfolio and/or your breach of this Legal Notice.
